name_romaji: Taishaku Jinsha Tetsudō Kankei Monjo Gojitten
name_en: Documents related to the Taishaku hand-pushed railway, 50 items
description_en: A collection of 50 documents related to the Taishaku hand-pushed railway. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is kept at the Museum of Local History and Astronomy, Shiratori 3-25-1, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Early modern documents of Jokoji Temple, 36 items
description_en: A collection of 36 early modern period documents of Jokoji Temple. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Yotsugi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Unusually shaped stone stupa slab of Henjoin Temple, one monument
description_en: An unusually shaped stone stupa slab (itabi) of Henjoin Temple, one monument. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Mizumoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Asamayama Funka Kawanagare Dekishisha Kuyōhi Ikki
name_en: Memorial monument for those drowned in the river after the eruption of Mount Asama, one monument
description_en: A memorial monument for those who drowned in the river following the eruption of Mount Asama, one monument. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Shibamata, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Kan'ei Kyūnen Mei Sano-ke Sekizō Gorintō Ikki
name_en: Stone five-ring pagoda of the Sano family inscribed with the date Kan'ei 9, one monument
description_en: A stone five-ring pagoda (gorinto) of the Sano family bearing an inscription of the year Kan'ei 9, one monument. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Tateishi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Gravestone of Matsura Kawachi-no-kami Nobumasa, one monument
description_en: The gravestone of Matsura Kawachi-no-kami Nobumasa, one monument. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Aoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Gochi Nyorai Sekizō Goku Tsuketari Zōryūhi
name_en: Stone statues of the Five Wisdom Buddhas, five figures, with the erection monument
description_en: Stone statues of the Five Wisdom Buddhas (Gochi Nyorai), five figures, accompanied by the monument commemorating their erection. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Shibamata, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Monument to agricultural achievements in Shibamata, one monument
description_en: A monument commemorating agricultural achievements in Shibamata, one monument. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Shibamata, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Katō Hinako no Hi Ikki Tsuketari Yamada Akiyoshi Kazaori Eboshi no Hi Ikki Kūsai Yamada Hakuzō Bokuhi Kensetsusha Meibo no Hi Ikki
name_en: Monument of Kato Hinako, one monument, with the monument of Yamada Akiyoshi's kazaori eboshi and the monument listing the builders of the Kusai Yamada Hakuzo ink monument
description_en: A monument of Kato Hinako (one monument), accompanied by a monument of Yamada Akiyoshi's kazaori eboshi cap and a monument bearing the roster of builders of the Kusai Yamada Hakuzo ink monument. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Yotsugi, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Gen'ei no I no Hi Ikki
name_en: Monument of the Gen'ei Well, one monument
description_en: A monument of the Gen'ei Well, one monument. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Kameari, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Bronze hanging votive plaque with Buddhist image, one plaque
description_en: A bronze hanging votive plaque bearing a Buddhist image (kakebotoke), one plaque. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Nishi-Mizumoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Ridgepole plaques of the Koai Fudo Hall, four plaques
description_en: Four ridgepole plaques (munafuda) of the Koai Fudo Hall. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is kept at the Museum of Local History and Astronomy, Shiratori 3-25-1, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Ridgepole plaque of Yatsurugi Shrine, one plaque
description_en: A ridgepole plaque (munafuda) of Yatsurugi Shrine, one plaque. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Okudo, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Ridgepole plaque of Takasago Tenso Shrine, one plaque
description_en: A ridgepole plaque (munafuda) of Takasago Tenso Shrine, one plaque. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Takasago, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Ridgepole plaque of Okudo Tenso Shrine, one plaque
description_en: A ridgepole plaque (munafuda) of Okudo Tenso Shrine, one plaque. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Okudo, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Kan'ei Jūnen Mei Shibamata Hachiman Jinja Munafuda Ichimai
name_en: Ridgepole plaque of Shibamata Hachiman Shrine inscribed with the date Kan'ei 10, one plaque
description_en: A ridgepole plaque (munafuda) of Shibamata Hachiman Shrine bearing an inscription of the year Kan'ei 10, one plaque. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Shibamata, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Kamichiba Sanjūbanshindō Mokuhai Ikki Tsuketari Genna Gonen Ryaku Honzon Ikki

description_en: A wooden tablet of the Kamichiba Sanjubanshin Hall (one tablet), accompanied by an abbreviated principal image dated Genna 5 (one item). It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Horikiri, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Wooden standing statues of the Kongo Rikishi guardians, two figures
description_en: Wooden standing statues of the Kongo Rikishi (Nio guardian) figures, two statues. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Yotsugi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Wooden plaque bearing the temple's mountain name, one plaque
description_en: A wooden plaque inscribed with a temple's mountain name (sango), one plaque. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Yotsugi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Artifacts excavated from the Shibamata riverbed
description_en: Artifacts excavated from the riverbed at Shibamata. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is kept at the Museum of Local History and Astronomy, Shiratori 3-25-1, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Wooden standing statue of Sho Kannon Bodhisattva
description_en: A wooden standing statue of Sho Kannon Bodhisattva. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Kameari, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Daikyōji (Shibamata Taishakuten) Shodōgun Kaisandō Soshidō Nitenmon Taishakudō Daishōrō Watarirōka
name_en: Hall complex of Daikyoji Temple (Shibamata Taishakuten): Kaisando, Soshido, Nitenmon gate, Taishakudo, great bell tower, and connecting corridor
description_en: The hall complex of Daikyoji Temple (Shibamata Taishakuten), comprising the Kaisando hall, Soshido hall, Nitenmon gate, Taishakudo hall, great bell tower, and connecting corridor. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Shibamata, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Former Tanakaya restaurant
description_en: The former Tanakaya traditional restaurant building. It is a tangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Shibamata, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Sword polishing (Japanese swords)
description_en: The craft of polishing Japanese swords. It is an intangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward, in Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Metalwork (Japanese swords)
description_en: The craft of metalwork for Japanese swords. It is an intangible cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is associated with Takasago, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Koshin tower of the Twenty-One Buddhas, one monument
description_en: A Koshin stone tower depicting the Twenty-One Buddhas, one monument. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Aoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Kanshō Rokunen Tsukimachi Kuyō Gazō Itabi Ikki
name_en: Pictorial stone stupa slab for a moon-waiting memorial service dated Kansho 6, one monument
description_en: A pictorial stone stupa slab (itabi) for a moon-waiting (tsukimachi) memorial service, dated Kansho 6, one monument. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Shinkoiwa, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Handa Inari Jinja Itae-rui Jūnimen Tsuketari Koema Harizuke no Ema Ukibori Kitsune Gaku Hokku Gaku Nishikie Gannin Bōzu Gaku Kaku Ichi
name_en: Panel paintings of Handa Inari Shrine, 12 panels, with a votive plaque of pasted small ema, a relief fox plaque, a hokku verse plaque, and a woodblock-print plaque of gannin bozu monks, one each
description_en: A set of 12 panel paintings of Handa Inari Shrine, accompanied by a votive plaque with small ema pasted on it, a relief-carved fox plaque, a hokku verse plaque, and a woodblock-print plaque of gannin bozu monks, one of each. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Panel paintings of Renshoji Temple, 19 panels
description_en: A set of 19 panel paintings of Renshoji Temple. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Kosuge, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Amida Sanzon Raigō Tsukimachi Kuyō Itabi Ikki
name_en: Stone stupa slab of the descent of the Amida triad for a moon-waiting memorial service, one monument
description_en: A stone stupa slab (itabi) depicting the descent of the Amida triad, made for a moon-waiting (tsukimachi) memorial service, one monument. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Mizumoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Mito Kaidō Ishibashi Kuyō Dōhyō Ikki
name_en: Memorial road marker for a stone bridge on the Mito Highway, one monument
description_en: A road marker erected as a memorial for a stone bridge on the Mito Highway, one monument. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Niijuku, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Votive picture plaque of well digging, one plaque
description_en: A votive picture plaque depicting well digging, one plaque. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Horikiri, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Colored panel votive plaque depicting a rain-making ritual, one plaque
description_en: A colored panel votive plaque (ema) depicting a rain-making ritual, one plaque. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Takasago, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Colored panel votive plaque depicting a Fuji pilgrimage confraternity, one plaque
description_en: A colored panel votive plaque (ema) depicting a Fuji pilgrimage confraternity (Fujiko), one plaque. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Minami-Mizumoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Monument of the segaki musical memorial service, one monument
description_en: A monument commemorating a segaki musical memorial service, one monument. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Aoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Colored panel votive plaque depicting a naked pilgrimage, one plaque
description_en: A colored panel votive plaque (ema) depicting a naked pilgrimage (hadakamairi), one plaque. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Aoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Colored panel votive plaque depicting a naked pilgrimage, one plaque
description_en: A colored panel votive plaque (ema) depicting a naked pilgrimage (hadakamairi), one plaque. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Okudo, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Shibamata Daikyōji Taishakuten Shutsugen Yuraihi Ikki
name_en: Monument on the origin of the appearance of Taishakuten at Daikyoji Temple, Shibamata, one monument
description_en: A monument recounting the origin of the appearance of Taishakuten at Daikyoji Temple in Shibamata, one monument. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Shibamata, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Stone statue of Aizen Myoo at Konrenin Temple, one statue
description_en: A stone statue of Aizen Myoo at Konrenin Temple, one statue. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Stone statue of Shoki at Kasai Shrine, one statue
description_en: A stone statue of Shoki (the demon queller) at Kasai Shrine, one statue. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.
